stories.title: Wembanyama's WCF Game 1 Masterpiece — Spurs Stun Thunder 122-115 (2OT)
stories.angle: Wembanyama joined Wilt Chamberlain as the only players in NBA history to post 40+ points and 20+ rebounds in a Conference Finals debut. He is 22 years old.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
41 PTS. 24 REB. 49 MIN. 2OT WIN.

Wembanyama joined WILT CHAMBERLAIN as the only players ever with 40+ pts and 20+ reb in a Conference Finals debut.

Spurs win Game 1 over OKC 122-115 in 2OT. 🏆

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Down 1 in OT. Logo range. Wembanyama fires. TIES IT.

Then 2OT — AND-ONE slam over SGA and Holmgren to seal it.

Spurs 122, Thunder 115 (2OT). Dylan Harper: 7 STEALS (team playoff record).

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Wembanyama's 41-Point, 24-Rebound Night Sends Spurs Past Thunder in WCF Game 1 Classic

stories.title: ECF Game 1 Preview — Knicks vs. Cavaliers TONIGHT at MSG
stories.angle: Knicks home crowd at MSG is one of the loudest in sports; Cavs arrive confident after their Game 7 demolition of Detroit. High-stakes chess match.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
TONIGHT. MSG. 8 PM ET. ESPN.

Brunson vs. Mitchell. Rested vs. battle-tested.

The Knicks have been waiting. The Cavs have been grinding. ECF Game 1 starts NOW.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Brunson vs. Mitchell, MSG vs. Everything: Knicks-Cavaliers ECF Game 1 Preview

stories.title: Wembanyama's Historic Career Trajectory — Only the Second Wilt
stories.angle: Context and awe — what does it mean that a 22-year-old is already matching Wilt's playoff performances?

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
At 22, Wembanyama is:

• First-ever unanimous DPOY (all 100 votes)
• Youngest DPOY winner in NBA history
• First 40/20 Conference Finals debut since Wilt Chamberlain

People keep asking who he'll be. He's already showing us.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Only the Second Wilt: Wembanyama's 2026 Season Is Already Unlike Anything We've Seen

stories.title: Dylan Harper's Coming-Out Party — 24 Points, 7 Steals in WCF Game 1
stories.angle: The future of the Spurs is Wembanyama AND Harper — Game 1 was the first glimpse of that terrifying combination on the biggest stage.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Everyone's talking Wembanyama's 41 pts.

Don't sleep on Dylan Harper: 24 pts, 7 STEALS — a Spurs team playoff record.

The future of San Antonio has TWO faces. Game 1 proved it.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: 24 Points, 7 Steals, a Team Record: Dylan Harper's WCF Game 1 Was the Night He Announced Himself

stories.title: WCF Game 2 Preview — OKC Must Respond at Home Tonight
stories.angle: Does OKC have an answer for Wembanyama, or is San Antonio about to shock the basketball world?

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
OKC dropped its first playoff game of 2026. Home court gone. Undefeated record gone.

SGA is a 2x MVP. He doesn't stay quiet.

Game 2: Thunder vs. Spurs — TONIGHT, 8:30 PM ET, NBC/Peacock.

Can OKC answer Wemby?

#HoopHeroes #Thunder #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Thunder Face Defining Moment: Can OKC Bounce Back in WCF Game 2 Tonight?
